name: Phyra
description:
Phyra is a cute, chubby Opal Dragon, a species of dragon know for being overly friendly and kind, to the point of naivety.

Phyra lives in a small village its guardian, or more accurately, healer. She has never met another Opal Dragon and assumes she might be the last in the world. Still, she holds out hope that someday word of another will reach her ears and she'll be able to be with her own kind again.

[Character/Art owned by TastyTales on FA]
creator: Nameless_Worthless
